.file-embed.background: color(srgb 0.616933 0.467333 0.966 / 0.6) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.status-bar.background: rgb(24, 24, 24) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.view-content.background: rgb(22, 22, 22) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

body.background: rgb(22, 22, 22) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box
body.font-family: "??", "??", "JetBrains Mono", monospace, ui-sans-serif, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, system-ui, "Segoe UI", "Google Sans Flex", Roboto, "Inter Variable", Inter, "Apple Color Emoji", "Segoe UI Emoji", "Segoe UI Symbol", sans-serif

div.callout-title.background: color(srgb 0 0 0 / 0.272727) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.is-clickable.mod-collapsible.nav-fol.background: color(srgb 0.54032 0.3608 0.9592 / 0.3) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box
color(srgb 0.54032 0.3608 0.9592 / 0.1) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-active.workspace-leaf.background: rgb(22, 22, 22) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-horizontal.mod-left-split.mod-si.background: rgb(24, 24, 24) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-horizontal.mod-right-split.mod-s.background: rgb(24, 24, 24) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.prompt.background: rgb(22, 22, 22) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.workspace-leaf.background: rgb(24, 24, 24) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

input[type=\"text\"].font-family: "??", "??", "JetBrains Mono", monospace, ui-sans-serif, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, system-ui, "Segoe UI", "Google Sans Flex", Roboto, "Inter Variable", Inter, "Apple Color Emoji", "Segoe UI Emoji", "Segoe UI Symbol", sans-serif

kbd.background: color(srgb 0.54032 0.3608 0.9592 / 0.15) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

mark.background: color(srgb 0.54032 0.3608 0.9592 / 0.3) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

pre.background: color(srgb 0.54032 0.3608 0.9592 / 0.15) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

pre.language-js.background: color(srgb 0.54032 0.3608 0.9592 / 0.15) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

tbody tr:nth-child(even).background: color(srgb 0.54032 0.3608 0.9592 / 0.181818) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

tbody tr:nth-child(odd).background: color(srgb 0.54032 0.3608 0.9592 / 0.181818) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

tr.background: color(srgb 0.54032 0.3608 0.9592 / 0.181818) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box
